TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Satabakiyay nu aenengan nu lacu / Ta-Paw-Tay == Satabakiay nu aenengan nu lacu / Ta-Paw-Tay, i Macau nu mukasiay a pawtay, u Cunkuo aydaay nu masingaay a nisangaan patideng tu sise' a nisangaan. Ś§ßÁāģŚŹį, . naw Macau nu hitayan a sakalepacawan nu kahemekan, ayda u Macau nu likisian a kakitidaan. . Tapawtay itida i Macau nu pangkiw suba nu taban nu cunyung Se buyu' , u sakay nu hitayan a nipikuwanan. . aydaay nu Tapawtay itida i teban u caysiw-siwwal a mihcaan nipatidengan i Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) po-wu-kuan , tungduh nu Tapawtay u Pawtay nu balubaluan. . Ta-San-Pa paya atu ta-paw-tay nina tusaay a aidangan milacad tu Cunpu picidekan nu lalangawan, mala picidekan nu Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) nu waluay a aidangan. Macau Ta-Paw-Tay patideng i caynem-caysip mihcaan, naw naw yi-su-huay sen-paw-lu nu cacudadan a kiwkay a sayday, midiput tunikay Macau nu yi-su-huay , nikuda satu mala Aw-Pu cen-hu namin. patidengan tu Ta-Paw-Tay makaala tu cacay a bataan, itini i caynem-tunem a masangan. . Ta-Paw-Tay atu Ma-Ke-Paw-Tay atu Dun-Wan-Yang-Paw-Tay mala tanektekay nu liklik nu hitayan, matalaw cumudan nu kukung. namaka cacay a malebut enem a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan (1623) katukuh tu cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu sepat a bataan (1740) a mihecaan, naw Cen-Fan-Si-Lin atu Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) nu satalakaway a enengan nu luma'. Śĺě1623 . Ta-Paw-Tay kakenihan i caysiw-nemnem mihcaan amahulak, pasayda i katuuday u aidangan kuyni sa. nikahulak satu nanisumadan tu sakay Aw-Men papatinakuwan tu demiad , nikudan nu Aw-Men papatinakuwan tu demiad itini i caysiw-siwnem mihcaan taydan i Dan-Cai . Ta-Paw-Tay namakakenih i caysiw-siwtu mihcaan, caysiw-siwlu mihcaan atu caysiw-siwnem mihcaan misumad tu papatidengan. . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku walu a mihcaan (1998), teban nu Ta-Paw-Tay patideng tu Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) po-wu-kuan , sayaway numitanengay a labang han u Ingkuo mitukuday tu mali ci Manlen.. 1998ŚĻī, .
S.PHON: == satabakijaj nu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺa ¶u / ta-paw-taj == satabakiaj nu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺa ¶u / ta-paw-taj, i ma ¶au nu mukasiaj a pawtaj, u ¶unkuo ajdaaj nu masiŇčaaj a nisaŇčaan patid…ôŇč tu sis…ô Ē~ ° a nisaŇčaan. ***, . naw ma ¶au nu ńßitajan a sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kańß…ôm…ôkan, ajda u ma ¶au nu r~…ĺikisian a kakitidaan. . tapawtaj itida i ma ¶au nu paŇčkiw suba nu taban nu ¶unjuŇč s…ô buju Ē~ ° , u sakaj nu ńßitajan a nipikuwanan. . ajdaaj nu tapawtaj itida i t…ôban u ¶ajsiw-siwwar~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan nipatid…ôŇčan i ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) po-wu-kuan , tuŇčduńß nu tapawtaj u pawtaj nu bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan. . ta-san-pa paja atu ta-paw-taj nina tusaaj a aidaŇčan mir~…ĺa ¶ad tu ¶unpu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mar~…ĺa pi ¶id…ôkan nu ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) nu war~…ĺuaj a aidaŇčan. ma ¶au ta-paw-taj patid…ôŇč i ¶ajn…ôm- ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan, naw naw ji-su-ńßuaj s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺu nu ¶a ¶udadan a kiwkaj a sajdaj, midiput tunikaj ma ¶au nu ji-su-ńßuaj , nikuda satu mar~…ĺa aw-pu ¶…ôn-ńßu namin. patid…ôŇčan tu ta-paw-taj makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan, itini i ¶ajn…ôm-tun…ôm a masaŇčan. . ta-paw-taj atu ma-k…ô-paw-taj atu dun-wan-jaŇč-paw-taj mar~…ĺa tan…ôkt…ôkaj nu r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu ńßitajan, matar~…ĺaw ¶umudan nu kukuŇč. namaka ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan (****) katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut pitu a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan, naw ¶…ôn-fan-si-r~…ĺin atu ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) nu satar~…ĺakawaj a …ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ***** . ta-paw-taj kak…ônińßan i ¶ajsiw-n…ômn…ôm mińß ¶aan amańßur~…ĺak, pasajda i katuudaj u aidaŇčan kujni sa. nikańßur~…ĺak satu nanisumadan tu sakaj aw-m…ôn papatinakuwan tu d…ômiad , nikudan nu aw-m…ôn papatinakuwan tu d…ômiad itini i ¶ajsiw-siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan tajdan i dan- ¶ai . ta-paw-taj namakak…ônińß i ¶ajsiw-siwtu mińß ¶aan, ¶ajsiw-siwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiw-siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan misumad tu papatid…ôŇčan. . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan (****), t…ôban nu ta-paw-taj patid…ôŇč tu ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) po-wu-kuan , sajawaj numitan…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč ńßan u iŇčkuo mitukudaj tu mar~…ĺi ¶i manr~…ĺ…ôn.. *****, .
S.FORM: == Satabakiyay nu aenengan nu lacu / Ta-Paw-Tay == Satabakiay nu aenengan nu lacu / Ta-Paw-Tay, i Macau nu mukasiay a pawtay, u Cunkuo aydaay nu masingaay a nisangaan patideng tu sise' a nisangaan. Ś§ßÁāģŚŹį, . naw Macau nu hitayan a sakalepacawan nu kahemekan, ayda u Macau nu likisian a kakitidaan. . Tapawtay itida i Macau nu pangkiw suba nu taban nu cunyung Se buyu' , u sakay nu hitayan a nipikuwanan. . aydaay nu Tapawtay itida i teban u caysiw-siwwal a mihcaan nipatidengan i Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) po-wu-kuan , tungduh nu Tapawtay u Pawtay nu balubaluan. . Ta-San-Pa paya atu ta-paw-tay nina tusaay a aidangan milacad tu Cunpu picidekan nu lalangawan, mala picidekan nu Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) nu waluay a aidangan. Macau Ta-Paw-Tay patideng i caynem-caysip mihcaan, naw naw yi-su-huay sen-paw-lu nu cacudadan a kiwkay a sayday, midiput tunikay Macau nu yi-su-huay , nikuda satu mala Aw-Pu cen-hu namin. patidengan tu Ta-Paw-Tay makaala tu cacay a bataan, itini i caynem-tunem a masangan. . Ta-Paw-Tay atu Ma-Ke-Paw-Tay atu Dun-Wan-Yang-Paw-Tay mala tanektekay nu liklik nu hitayan, matalaw cumudan nu kukung. namaka cacay a malebut enem a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan (1623) katukuh tu cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu sepat a bataan (1740) a mihecaan, naw Cen-Fan-Si-Lin atu Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) nu satalakaway a enengan nu luma'. Śĺě1623 . Ta-Paw-Tay kakenihan i caysiw-nemnem mihcaan amahulak, pasayda i katuuday u aidangan kuyni sa. nikahulak satu nanisumadan tu sakay Aw-Men papatinakuwan tu demiad , nikudan nu Aw-Men papatinakuwan tu demiad itini i caysiw-siwnem mihcaan taydan i Dan-Cai . Ta-Paw-Tay namakakenih i caysiw-siwtu mihcaan, caysiw-siwlu mihcaan atu caysiw-siwnem mihcaan misumad tu papatidengan. . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku walu a mihcaan (1998), teban nu Ta-Paw-Tay patideng tu Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) po-wu-kuan , sayaway numitanengay a labang han u Ingkuo mitukuday tu mali ci Manlen.. 1998ŚĻī, .

sis…ô Ē~ ° a nisaŇčaan. ***, . naw ma ¶au nu ńßitajan a sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kańß…ôm…ôkan, ajda u ma ¶au nu r~…ĺikisian a kakitidaan. . tapawtaj itida i ma ¶au nu paŇčkiw suba nu taban nu ¶unjuŇč s…ô buju Ē~ ° , u sakaj nu ńßitajan a nipikuwanan. . ajdaaj nu tapawtaj itida i t…ôban u ¶ajsiw-siwwar~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan nipatid…ôŇčan i ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) po-wu-kuan , tuŇčduńß nu tapawtaj u pawtaj nu bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan. . ta-san-pa paja atu ta-paw-taj nina tusaaj a aidaŇčan mir~…ĺa ¶ad tu ¶unpu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mar~…ĺa pi ¶id…ôkan nu ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) nu war~…ĺuaj a aidaŇčan. ma ¶au ta-paw-taj patid…ôŇč i ¶ajn…ôm- ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan, naw naw ji-su-ńßuaj s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺu nu ¶a ¶udadan a kiwkaj a sajdaj, midiput tunikaj ma ¶au nu ji-su-ńßuaj , nikuda satu mar~…ĺa aw-pu ¶…ôn-ńßu namin. patid…ôŇčan tu ta-paw-taj makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan, itini i ¶ajn…ôm-tun…ôm a masaŇčan. . ta-paw-taj atu ma-k…ô-paw-taj atu dun-wan-jaŇč-paw-taj mar~…ĺa tan…ôkt…ôkaj nu r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu ńßitajan, matar~…ĺaw ¶umudan nu kukuŇč. namaka ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan (****) katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut pitu a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan, naw ¶…ôn-fan-si-r~…ĺin atu ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) nu satar~…ĺakawaj a …ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ***** . ta-paw-taj kak…ônińßan i ¶ajsiw-n…ômn…ôm mińß ¶aan amańßur~…ĺak, pasajda i katuudaj u aidaŇčan kujni sa. nikańßur~…ĺak satu nanisumadan tu sakaj aw-m…ôn papatinakuwan tu d…ômiad , nikudan nu aw-m…ôn papatinakuwan tu d…ômiad itini i ¶ajsiw-siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan tajdan i dan- ¶ai . ta-paw-taj namakak…ônińß i ¶ajsiw-siwtu mińß ¶aan, ¶ajsiw-siwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiw-siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan misumad tu papatid…ôŇčan. . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan (****), t…ôban nu ta-paw-taj patid…ôŇč tu ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) po-wu-kuan , sajawaj numitan…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč ńßan u iŇčkuo mitukudaj tu mar~…ĺi ¶i manr~…ĺ…ôn.. *****, .
